cooperates.cooperate_desc: Suyou can easily combo with Kalea because unlike other roam, she can provide a high level CC while also giving heal to nearby teammates
With Badang Combo, Suyou can easily join the fight to secure the kill and run away after it
With his strong damage and control, Suyou can easily march to the enemy when Pharsa using her ultimate

counters.counter_desc: Suyou is fast, but Yi Sun-shin is faster and have immune skill which Suyou didn't have. So avoid doing 1v1 against him
Suyou can counter Hayabusa in a certain moment. If Hayabusa tried to use his ultimate to you, you can easily escape by your skill 1 tap or skill 3 tap
With Fredrinn mobility and tanky build, Suyou having a hard time to deal with him
The only way for Suyou to eliminate Julian is by using a feint and retreat strategy
Minsitthar is a nightmare for a hero with high mobility

dominants.dominant_desc:
Aware with your map, and become the finisher instead of the inisiator. With his mobility, Suyou can easily enter a fight and leave immediately after secure kills. But, you can do a solo kill if the enemy is a squishy like a mage or marksman. If against stronger enemy, use a feint and retreat staregy, because after all, Suyou is a finisher. 

Since Suyou has 2 types of his every skill (tap and hold), make sure you know exactly how to maximize his potential.
Skill 1: You can use your tap skill 1 to get close to the enemy or run from the enemy. But if you tried to eliminate squishy enemy alone, hold skill 1 so it can give a stun. 
Skill 2: If the enemy still have more than 30% percent HP, hold your skill would be better. Only use your tap skill to last hit the creep and the enemy with low hp. His tap skill can also be used by using retribution at the same time to steal the turtle or lord. 
Skill 3: You can use the tap skill to finish off the enemy. Make sure you know the range of his skill and know exactly where you aim it. Meanwhile his hold skill, use it to clear the minion or poke the enemy. It also can be used as finisher if the enemy manage to escape
dominants.dominant_title: Before level 4, you can actually roam around to kill the enemy EXP laner or Gold laner because Suyou already have his 3rd skill on level 3. So make sure you at least secure kill before continue farm

emblems.emblem_desc:
Thrill: You need more damage, so Thrill would be suitable. But if your enemy are mostly tanky, then you can use rupture. 
Seasoned Hunter: For fast farming, this talents will help you farm fast and roam around to pick off the enemy. 
Killing Spree: As a finisher, this talents are really needed to help you wipe out the enemy by recovering your HP after killing the enemy.

equips.equip_desc:
First, just buy the boots so you can activate the passive of retribution to help you farm faster. After that, straight up prioritizing Hunter Strike to give you more mobility to enter a fight and runaway after that. You can buy the Magic Boots right after so you can have the 10% CD reduction. Next, prioritize War Axe so you can have the spell vamp as well as the 10% CD reduction. Queen's Wings is also a great choice because not only you gain another 10% CD reduction, you also gain spell vamp and Demonize passive which can save you from instant death due to its 30% damage reduction for 3 second, by also reducing you skill CD by 2 seconds. The rest of the item is actually just up to you. If u already snowball and you think you need more damage, buy Blade of Despair and Malefic Roar if your enemy is tanky. 

Addition: Actually, you can buy Skypiercer after finishing your Hunter Strike and Magic Boots, BUT only if you snowball and already secure so much kill. But remember, when you already lost its stack, just sell instead of keeping it.

spell.spell_desc: As jungler, retribution is a must battle spell

hero.hero_strength: Op

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Suyou works really well with Badang because their skills match perfectly in fights. Badang can trap enemies with his wall and knock them back which makes it super easy for Suyou to jump in and finish them off. Suyou needs enemies to stay still so he can deal big damage quickly and Badang's crowd control helps him do just that. Together they can dominate team fights and ganks making it hard for enemies to escape or fight back. They're a great combo for putting pressure on the map and getting kills.

counters.counter_desc: Suyou is a strong counter to Pharsa because of how easily he can close the distance and burst her down before she can react. Pharsa relies on staying far away and using her ultimate from a safe spot but once Suyou dives in she has no strong escape tools to get away. Her skills need good timing and positioning which Suyou can ruin instantly with his fast mobility and damage. In most cases Suyou can catch her off guard especially when she's channeling her ult making her an easy target. That's why he has a huge advantage over her in both 1 v 1 fights and team scenarios.

dominants.dominant_desc: Start taking buff from the turtle lane and  clear every jungle on both the sides and then Gank gold lane (if there's a possibility that you can get quick kills but do not overextent). Do not waste much time waiting for enemy on gold lane  instead try clearing enemy jungle which will delay enemy jungler's farm.

As the jungler it's ur responsibility to secure the turtles and lord which will put ur team on a advantageous postion. Always priotize clearing jungle creeps, do not join fights that you know you can't win, look out for easy kills but do not overextent, keep looking at the map constantly if your team is trying to Gank help them out ( if you think it's a winnable gank then help them if no ping them to retreat and focus on farming) and get back to junling.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Thrill basically increases burst damage.
Seasoned hunter helps u clear the jungle faster n build core items quickly.
Killing spree provides heal and speed up after each killing which allows him to sustain longer and secure more kils without retreating.

equips.equip_desc:
Ice Hunter's Tough Boots gives crowd control resistance and more utility in jungle.

Hunter strike and Sky piercer boost physical penetration and and provide cooldown reduction for faster combos.
And Sky piercer helps u secure kills which helps u get more gold n farm faster as jungler.

War Axe helps sustain in fights longer when engaging multiple enemies.

Malefic Roar helps to melt tank or any other tanky heroes with high physical defense.

Rose Gold meteor adds a safety net with its sheild which is perfect for diving and clutch survival.

hero.hero_overview: Suyou is a super fast and fun jungler to play. His skills let him dash around the map quickly so clearing jungle camps and ganking lanes feels smooth and efficient. What makes him scary is how easily he can sneak up on enemies burst them down and get out before they even know what hit them. If you like fast-paced gameplay and love making surprise plays Suyou is definitely your guy.

spell.spell_desc: Retribution is a must for Suyou in the jungle. It helps you clear camps way faster and secure important stuff like Turtle and Lord which can turn the tide of the game. Plus with retribution upgrades you get bonus damage on enemies which makes it even easier to get early kills and snowball hard.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Before Level 4
	Weak Engage Potential: Suyou lacks access to his full combo and ultimate, limiting his burst and chase power.
	Skill Reliant: Needs to land his early skills precisely to trade effectively or escape—otherwise, he can be outmatched by more oppressive early-game heroes like Lancelot or Hayabusa.
	Avoid Skirmishes: Best to focus on safe farming or jungling until unlocking all three skills.

Early Game 
	Power Spike at Lv.4: Gaining Evil Queller gives him increased outplay potential and escape tools, allowing him to begin roaming and picking off low-HP targets.
	Strong Roaming Assassin: Excels in ambushes and quick skirmishes by switching between forms—can snowball if he secures early kills.
	Objective Control: With Seasoned Hunter and fast clear, he can take turtles and buffs efficiently if uncontested.

Mid to Late Game
	Assassin Role Amplified: Strong at isolating and eliminating enemy backliners, especially squishy Mages or Marksmen.
	Form Fluidity: Immortal Form allows for durability and healing during drawn-out fights, while Mortal Form provides mobility and fast repositioning.
	Needs Precise Timing: Must choose the right moments to engage and disengage—poor timing can lead to being caught out or wasted skills.


During Team Fights
	Pick-Off Specialist: Best used to dive the backline after the enemy crowd control is burned; can assassinate priority targets swiftly.
	Risky Initiator: Lacks hard CC and bulk to start fights safely—better as a secondary engager or follow-up damage dealer.
	Form Mastery is Key: Switching forms mid-fight can turn the tide, but misusing cooldowns or committing in the wrong form can get him eliminated fast.
dominants.dominant_title: ALWAYS TAKE WHATEVER YOU CAN GET IN FARM AREA AND WATCH THIS GUIDE:

emblems.emblem_desc:
Emblem: Assassin Emblem
Talents: Thrill: Provides extra Physical Attack, essential for early game wave clear and kill potential.
Seasoned Hunter: Increases damage against jungle monsters, speeding up farming and objective control.
Impure Rage: Maximizes damage output and sustainability by dealing HP-based damage and gaining mana with each skill hit.

equips.equip_desc:
OVERVIEW: 

Tough Boots (Ice Retribution): Provides magic defense and movement speed.

Hunter Strike: Boosts Physical Attack and Movement Speed.

War Axe: Increases Physical Attack and provides bonus damage.

Queens Wings: Reduces damage taken and offers lifesteal when HP is low.

Blade of Despair: Significantly boosts damage against low-health enemies.

Malefic Roar: Ensures effectiveness against durable opponents by providing armor penetration.

hero.hero_overview: Suyou unique skill set and adaptability make him a formidable hero.  Whether you prefer to engage in direct combat or execute swift ambushes, Suyou offers a dynamic playstyle to suit various strategies.
hero.hero_strength:
1. With his high mobility and damage-focused skill set, Suyou can quickly clear jungle camps using Soul Sever and Blade Surge, especially with the Assassin Emblem and jungle item (Ice Retribution).
2. Sustain in Immortal Form: His Soul Sever (Immortal) heals him, giving him durability to survive extended farming or dueling in lane.
3. High Burst Damage: Suyou excels at isolating and eliminating backline targets quickly using Blade Surge and Soul Sever.
4. Form Switching: His ability to switch between Mortal and Immortal forms gives him flexible roles in fights — Mortal for poking and quick engagements, Immortal for sustained combat and tankiness.
5. AOE Control: Soul Sever (Immortal) deals fan-shaped cleaves, making him effective against clustered enemies.
6. Disengage Tools: Evil Queller (Mortal) allows Suyou to retreat while damaging and slowing enemies, which is crucial for repositioning.

Game Phase Strength:
Early Game: Strong due to high mobility and ability to rotate. Assassin Emblem and Retribution allows for fast objective control.

Mid Game: Peak power phase. Core items like War Axe and Hunter Strike enhance his burst and mobility, making him a deadly roamer.

Late Game: Still effective due to scaling from Passive Transient Immortal and defensive utility from Queen Wings.
hero.hero_weakness:
Laning/Farming Disadvantages
	Item Dependent: Suyou relies heavily on early item progression (like Hunter Strike and War Axe) to deal meaningful damage. Falling behind in farm significantly weakens his impact.

Vulnerable to Invades: As a jungler, Suyou can be disrupted early by aggressive opponents like Ling, Martis, or Baxia, especially before unlocking all three skills.

No Hard CC: While he has slows and mobility, he lacks reliable crowd control, making it harder to lock down targets or peel for teammates in lane.

data.title: MPL PICK

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Lukas ability to interrupt enemies spell cast animation is a huge advantage. Giving you opportunity to cast your abilities without worries.

counters.counter_desc: Badang knockback and stun if against a wall can be annoying. While suyou is at a disadvantage, you can use your 1st tap to get out of sticky situations. Have that ready and use that sparingly if against badang.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Laning will be difficult if your team doesn't respond accordingly. So, reach lvl4. Gank mid lane after clearing your lane. Gank gold lane if you get the chance. 
Always keep an eye on the map and push while enemy exp lanes is busy and visible on the opposite side of your lane.

Your role will be similar to jungler/hyper. Clear/push your lane, then gank every chance you get while maintaining your lane.

emblems.emblem_desc: You can use this setup with assassin emblem as base.

equips.equip_desc:
Swap hunter strike and Brute force as necessary with Malefic roar for tanky enemies and Sea Halberd for enemies with high life steal. Any other defense items like Athena shield is viable so you can rush into fight and survive against burst magic heroes.
As always, build to counter your enemies.

hero.hero_overview: Good damage and mobility to either rush into battle or get out of battle.
hero.hero_strength: His strength lies in his mobility.
hero.hero_weakness: Weak against enemies that outmatch his mobility.

data.recommend: Suyou on Exp lane is a killer.

spell.spell_desc:
Flicker will help you reposition yourself or get you out of trouble. 
Vengeance is a viable option that allows more room for errors while providing damage reduction for survival.
